atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports severe right upper arm pain, rating it a nine out of ten.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports ibuprofen is not helping the pain.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient describes how he fell while spiking the ball.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient notes that someone kicked his legs from under him.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports pain in the left hand.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports the ball was dirty last night.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports he landed on his arm.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The physician observes swelling and erythema on the right shoulder.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient can straighten their arm as long as they do not move their shoulder.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The physician identifies a proximal humerus fracture.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient's symptoms are consistent with a fracture sustained during a volleyball game.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The physician prescribes lortab 500 mg tablets, 20 tablets.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The physician orders a long arm cast and a sling.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The physician schedules a follow-up appointment in two weeks to assess healing and determine if surgery is needed.
